1→"""Helper functions for accessing context dependencies with LBYL checks. 2→ 3→This module provides getter functions that encapsulate the "Look Before You Leap" 4→pattern for accessing dependencies from the ErkContext. These functions: 5→ 6→1. Check that context is initialized 7→2. Return the typed dependency 8→3. Exit with clear error message if context is missing 9→ 10→This eliminates code duplication across kit CLI commands. 11→""" 12→ 13→from __future__ import annotations 14→ 15→from pathlib import Path 16→ 17→import click 18→ 19→from erk_shared.context.context import ErkContext 20→from erk_shared.context.types import LoadedConfig, NoRepoSentinel 21→from erk_shared.core.prompt_executor import PromptExecutor 22→from erk_shared.gateway.branch_manager.abc import BranchManager 23→from erk_shared.gateway.claude_installation.abc import ClaudeInstallation 24→from erk_shared.gateway.git.abc import Git 25→from erk_shared.gateway.github.abc import LocalGitHub 26→from erk_shared.gateway.github.issues.abc import GitHubIssues 27→from erk_shared.gateway.time.abc import Time 28→from erk_shared.pr_store.backend import ManagedPrBackend 29→ 30→
